chats.text: so i was made aware that the offer is getting pulled. like, immediately.
this isn't a thing? anyone else see this?
i was made aware of the timeline shift last week but i didn't want to rock the boat until we had a concrete answer.
the jargon spits are getting more advanced though. gpt-5 training data is bleeding into the linkedin speak layer.
i'm also made aware of the new wellness benefits rollout next quarter. it's... generous?
the bandwidth of this conversation is concerning. if anyone needs to process that, they're made aware of the HR portal.
also the LARP is this friday. you coming? or are you... staying in your comfort zone?
someone tell me this is an anomaly or...?
peace.
yo
good luck, bro
hey thanks, dude
Guys, I was just made aware of some bandwidth constraints with the platform engineering sprint. Construct might not be feasible Q3.
{NAME} if you're getting out of LARP logistics analytics that's a major shift. Construct would be the natural place for that kind of bandwidth.
{NAME} they literally told me I can move up the ladder if I disagree with everyone and talk like them. That's not a job—that's theater.
{NAME} congrats on the big race by the way. Your dad's thing is a solid construct even if your bandwidth is... limited.
Yo guys, the promotion criteria are literally just 'disagree with everyone in a performative way'. It's not about ideas it's about cadence. I've been calibrated.
Anybody else getting 90% match scores on their LinkedIn then realizing the job is actually just reading the same 3 bullets we all memorized in Q4?
Look I don't know who you are but if your dad's LARP gig pays him more than my salary band I have a question about the compensation philosophy. 😅
If you're looking around 'nothing serious' then just fill out the application again with a more serious version of yourself and we'll match you to 95%. The platform is always ready for you.
The way this meeting went I think we all collectively agreed that 'peace' is the last word you can type before they start tracking your engagement metrics.
